hooks.command: av=$(awk -F"'" '/^const APP_VERSION/{print $2}' game.js); cv=$(awk -F"'" '/^const CACHE/{print $2}' service-worker.js | sed 's/alchemists-engine-//'); [ "$av" = "$cv" ] || { echo "BLOCKED: APP_VERSION='$av' (game.js) does not match CACHE suffix='$cv' (service-worker.js). Bump BOTH in lock-step before committing -- see CLAUDE.md and cowork ticket 0030." >&2; exit 2; }
